SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED FENCE CONTRACTORS DBA THOMPSON & THOMPSON FENCE CO. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD GYM SHOWPLACE SQUARE TALMADGE, JOE TALMADGE, ROBIN
